description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and try-import branches and on pull requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: check-commit and check-format for commit and code format checks on ubuntu-latest, cpu-test and gpu-test for tests on a self-hosted environment with a custom Docker image, auto-merge to merge try-import into master if successful, and send-dingding to send a DingTalk notification on failure.
